subcodes.first_line: O Aqa Jan! The Beloved of the world hath turned towards thee from the Most Great Prison and maketh mention of thee. What bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا آقاجان محبوب عالم از شطر سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید آیا فضلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
